actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Olympic gold medallist Dawn Harper-Nelson has been banned for three months after taking a diuretic medication without realising it was on the World Anti-Doping Agency's banned list.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Andi Leigh Edwards has been charged with the murder of Alex Woods.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Raisuqe has been suspended for 15 weeks for stamping on an opponent during a European Challenge Cup match.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man was assaulted and kidnapped, before escaping and being found by police.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been assaulted and kidnapped, and more details will be published shortly.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A swan has been rescued after it became entangled in fishing line and lead weights.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A drone was spotted near Manchester Airport, causing flight delays.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A motorcyclist and passenger were taken to hospital after a crash.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A new Learning Town project has been proposed, which would see the closure of a secondary school and the relocation of three primaries and a school for children with complex needs.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman was killed after being struck by a bus in Edinburgh.
